name: Lady Bird Johnson's Famous Lemon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter or margarine with sugar until light and fluffy.
2. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks until light and lemon-colored; blend with the creamed mixture.
3. Sift together cake flour, baking powder, and salt; re-sift 3 times.
4. Add the sifted ingredients in thirds, alternating with milk. Beat batter thoroughly after each addition.
5. Add vanilla, lemon rind, and juice and beat for 2 minutes.
6. Bake at 325°F in a bundt pan for 1 hour. Alternatively, bake in 3 greased 9-inch pans at 350°F.
LEMON ICING
Combine all lemon icing ingredients and spread on cake.
